name: rainven-theme

theme_accent_color.description: Set the primary Rainven accent color used for links, buttons, CTAs, and accent callouts

link_post_authors.description: Link post author names and avatars to author archive pages

post_feature_image.description: Choose whether Ghost featured images display on post pages

show_post_tags.description: Show post tags below post content

show_post_subscribe.description: Show the subscribe box below post content

show_github_social_link.description: Show the GitHub icon in the homepage hero social links

github_url.description: Full GitHub profile URL used in the homepage hero social links

post_content_width.description: Choose the reading width for post pages

style_last_nav_item_as_cta.description: Style the last navigation item as a CTA button

hide_header_theme_toggle.description: Hide the color theme toggle in the header

hide_footer_theme_toggle.description: Hide the color theme toggle in the footer

description: A clean Ghost theme for independent publishing.
